prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You’ve got this! Sometimes the hardest part is just starting, and you’re already there, ready to tackle it. Remember, every small step forward is progress. Focus on one piece at a time, and don’t worry about perfection—just keep moving. You’re stronger and more capable than you think, and once you dive in, you’ll be amazed at how much you can accomplish. Go for it!
